description.en: Account service API key request header assigned by Onerway. Use the value for the same environment as the request base URL.
description.zh: Onerway 分配的账户服务 API 密钥请求头。请使用与请求基础 URL 相同环境的值。

description.en: Transaction billing information, including customer billing address and contact details.
description.zh: 交易账单信息，包括客户账单地址与联系方式。

description.en: Customer first name in Japanese Katakana. Required only for Japan payment methods and Japan-issued cards.
description.zh: 日语片假名格式的名字；仅日本支付方式和日本发行的卡需要。

description.en: Customer last name in Japanese Katakana. Required only for Japan payment methods and Japan-issued cards.
description.zh: 日语片假名格式的姓氏；仅日本支付方式和日本发行的卡需要。

description.en: Customer phone number, local part only (without country code); pass the country code separately in `phoneCountryCode`, which combines with this field into the full number. Onerway does not strictly validate the format.
description.zh: 客户电话号码，仅填本地号码（不含国家码）；国家码请单独传入 `phoneCountryCode`，二者组合为完整号码。Onerway 当前不强校验格式。

condition.en: Required when paying with the MB Way local payment method.
condition.zh: 使用 MB Way 本地支付方式时必填。

description.en: Country dialing code of the customer phone number, digits only without `+`; combines with `phone` to form the full number.
description.zh: 客户电话号码的国家拨号码，纯数字、不含 `+`；与 `phone` 组合为完整号码。

description.en: Customer email address; used for transaction confirmations and dispute handling.
description.zh: 客户邮箱地址，用于交易确认和争议处理。

description.en: Postal or ZIP code. Commonly used by AVS checks.
description.zh: 邮政编码；许多地区的 AVS 验证需要此字段。

description.en: Full address in a single field. It can replace split street, house number, and city fields for general address capture, but should not be used as the only address input when AVS is required.
description.zh: 完整地址字段，可替代街道、门牌号和城市等拆分字段；开启 AVS 时不建议仅用该字段替代拆分地址字段。

condition.en: Required when `country` is `US` or `CA`.
condition.zh: 当 `country` 为 `US` 或 `CA` 时必填。

description.en: Province or state code in [ISO 3166-2](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-2#Current_codes) format.
City name. Recommended when AVS or a complete billing address is required to improve address completeness, authorization rate, and risk checks. Actual validation dimensions vary by issuer and region.
description.zh: 城市名称。开启 AVS 或需要完整账单地址时建议传入，用于补充地址完整性、授权率和风控判断；不同发卡行和地区的实际校验维度可能不同。

description.en: Street name. When AVS is enabled, provide it separately with `number`, `postalCode`, and `city` as billing-address verification data instead of relying only on the full `address` field.
description.zh: 街道名称。开启 AVS 时建议与 `number`、`postalCode`、`city` 拆分传入，作为账单地址验证相关信息；不要仅用完整 `address` 字段替代拆分地址。

description.en: House or building number. When AVS is enabled, provide it separately with `street`, `postalCode`, and `city` as billing-address verification data.
description.zh: 门牌号或建筑号。开启 AVS 时建议与 `street`、`postalCode`、`city` 拆分传入，作为账单地址验证相关信息。

description.en: Government-issued identity identifier, usually required by selected local payment methods. It may be a national ID number or a personal tax number.
description.zh: 政府颁发的身份标识，通常用于特定本地支付方式；可能是身份证号码，也可能是个人税号。

description.en: Card payment information. Checkout currently supports only `holderName`; when provided, it pre-fills the cardholder name on the hosted checkout form.
description.zh: 卡支付信息。收银台场景当前仅支持 `holderName`；提供后可预填持卡人姓名。

description.en: Cardholder name. When provided, it pre-fills the hosted checkout payment form.
description.zh: 持卡人姓名；提供后将预填到收银台支付表单。

description.en: Local payment method information. When used with `productType=ALL`, setting `lpmsType` limits checkout to the specified local payment method.
description.zh: 本地支付方式信息。结合 `productType=ALL` 使用时，设置 `lpmsType` 后收银台仅展示指定本地支付方式。

description.en: Alipay payment method in mainland China.
description.zh: 支付宝中国内地支付方式。

description.en: Banco do Brasil bank payment method.
description.zh: Banco do Brasil 银行支付方式。
电子资金转账支付方式。
SPEI 银行转账支付方式。
OXXO 现金凭证支付方式。
SEPA 直接借记支付方式。
Pay by Bank 银行账户支付方式。
GrabPay Singapore 钱包支付方式。
Rabbit LINE Pay 支付方式。
Krungsri Online 网银支付方式。
Citi Rewards Points 支付方式。
Touch 'n Go eWallet 支付方式。
BNI 虚拟账户支付方式。
Mandiri 虚拟账户支付方式。
Maybank 虚拟账户支付方式。
Permata 虚拟账户支付方式。
BRI 虚拟账户支付方式。
CIMB 虚拟账户支付方式。

condition.en: Required when `lpmsType=EFT` or `lpmsType=Przelewy24`.
condition.zh: 当 `lpmsType=EFT` 或 `lpmsType=Przelewy24` 时必填。

description.en: Santander Bank Polska - Pretzel24 payment system
description.zh: Santander Bank Polska - Pretzel24 payment system

description.en: Bank Polska Kasa Opieki Spółka Akcyjna
description.zh: Bank Polska Kasa Opieki Spółka Akcyjna

description.en: Bank Polska Kasa Opieki Spółka Akcyjna (duplicate entry)
description.zh: Bank Polska Kasa Opieki Spółka Akcyjna (duplicate entry)

description.en: Bank identifier. Send the enum item `value`; `description` is only the bank name display text.
description.zh: 银行标识。请求中传入枚举项的 `value`，`description` 仅用于说明银行名称。

condition.en: Required when the selected local payment method collects a wallet account or local account identifier.
condition.zh: 所选本地支付方式需要采集钱包账户或本地账户标识符时必填。

description.zh: 钱包或本地账户标识符。

condition.en: Required by selected `ATM_CARD` local payment methods.
condition.zh: 特定 `ATM_CARD` 类本地支付方式需要。

condition.en: Required for regional bank-transfer flows that use IBAN for bank identification.
condition.zh: 在使用 IBAN 进行银行识别的地区转账时必填。

condition.en: Required when the selected Japan prepaid payment method collects a prepaid card or voucher number.
condition.zh: 所选日本预付类支付方式需要采集预付卡或充值卡号时必填。

description.en: Unique customer identifier in the merchant system.
description.zh: 客户在商户系统中的唯一标识。

text.en: For non-subscription checkout, provide it when you want the hosted checkout page to offer saved-payment-method options.
text.zh: 非订阅收银台场景下，商户如希望降低复购摩擦，可传入该字段，收银台会向客户提供保存卡信息的选项。

text.en: For subscription checkout, use `subscription.merchantCustId` as the required subscription customer identifier; if top-level `merchantCustId` is submitted together with `subscription.merchantCustId`, the two values must match.
text.zh: 订阅交易中应以 `subscription.merchantCustId` 作为订阅客户标识；外层 `merchantCustId` 可不传，若同传则必须与 `subscription.merchantCustId` 保持一致。

description.en: Merchant number assigned by Onerway. See [Setup](/payments/get-started/setup#retrieve-your-credentials) for how to obtain it.
description.zh: Onerway 分配的商户号；获取方式参见[接入准备](/zh/payments/get-started/setup#获取凭证)。

description.en: Unique transaction identifier generated by the merchant system for tracking, reconciliation, and duplicate prevention.
description.zh: 商户系统生成的每笔支付唯一交易标识，用于交易跟踪、对账和防重复处理。

description.en: Customer first name in Japanese Katakana. Required only for Japan payment methods and Japan-issued cards.
description.zh: 日语片假名格式的名字；仅日本支付方式和日本发行的卡需要。

description.en: Katakana name fields are in beta while we expand Japan coverage; validation rules may still change.
description.zh: 片假名姓名字段处于 Beta 阶段，日本覆盖范围仍在扩展，校验规则可能变动。

description.en: Timezone offset for `merchantTxnTime`. If omitted, Onerway records the transaction time in UTC+8.
description.zh: `merchantTxnTime` 对应的时区偏移量；未传时 Onerway 默认使用 UTC+8 时区记录交易时间。

description.en: Merchant custom transaction data returned in transaction queries and asynchronous notifications.
description.zh: 商户自定义交易数据，可在交易查询和异步通知中返回。

text.en: JSON string format is recommended; when omitted, `metaData` is empty in queries and notifications.
text.zh: 建议使用 JSON 字符串；未传入时，交易查询和异步通知中的 `metaData` 为空。

text.en: If both top-level `metaData` and `subscription.metaData` are submitted, `subscription.metaData` takes precedence.
text.zh: 若外层 `metaData` 与 `subscription.metaData` 同时传入，以 `subscription.metaData` 为准。

description.en: Transaction amount in the specified currency, formatted as a decimal string. For zero-decimal currencies, the amount must represent a whole amount; an all-zero decimal part is accepted, while non-zero decimals are rejected. Format rules follow [currency and amount validation](/payments/get-started/currency-and-amount).
description.zh: 指定货币的交易金额，使用十进制字符串。零小数币种必须表示整数金额，可带 `.00` 这类全 0 小数；非零小数会被拒绝。格式要求详见[币种与金额校验](/zh/payments/get-started/currency-and-amount)。
[ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217) 三位字母货币代码，需与 `orderAmount` 匹配。

condition.en: Required when `paymentMode` is `APP` or `WAP`.
condition.zh: 当 `paymentMode` 为 `APP` 或 `WAP` 时必填。

description.en: Operating system type for mobile and app-based checkout transactions. Hosted checkout recommends `WEB` mode and usually does not require this field.
description.zh: 移动端和应用交易的操作系统类型。收银台建议使用 `WEB` 模式，通常不建议传此字段。
原生移动 App 支付。

description.en: Payment mode indicating the platform or environment for the transaction. Checkout recommends the default `WEB` mode.
description.zh: 交易平台或环境的支付模式；收银台建议使用默认值 `WEB`。

description.en: Payment method configuration options. Checkout currently supports the `card` object.
description.zh: 支付方式配置选项。收银台当前仅包含 `card` 对象。
卡支付相关的收银台配置。

description.en: Whether AVS (Address Verification Service) validation is enabled. Contact Onerway before enabling it. When set to `true`, the billing address is used for AVS checks and results are returned in `paymentMethodDetails.card.checks` through transaction queries and webhooks.
description.zh: 是否开启 AVS（地址验证服务）验证；使用前需提前联系 Onerway。设为 `true` 时，将使用账单地址进行 AVS 验证；验证结果通过交易查询和 Webhook 在 `paymentMethodDetails.card.checks` 中返回。

description.en: Unified Checkout. Display all payment methods available for the merchant and transaction conditions; when `lpmsInfo.lpmsType` is also provided, display only the specified local payment method.
description.zh: 聚合收银台，展示当前商户和交易条件下可用的所有支付方式；如同时传入 `lpmsInfo.lpmsType`，��仅展示指定本地支付方式。

description.en: Card-only checkout. Display card payment methods only; support for authorization, subscriptions, installments, or saving payment information still depends on `subProductType`, `txnType`, and the merchant's enabled configuration.
description.zh: 仅展示卡支付方式；是否支持预授权、订阅、分期或保存卡等能力，还需结合 `subProductType`、`txnType` 和商户开通配置确认。

description.en: Payment method display scope for the hosted checkout. It controls which payment method categories the customer can choose from; the processing model is further determined by `subProductType` and `txnType`.
description.zh: 收银台支付方式展示范围，用于决定客户在收银台可选择的支付方式类别；后续交易处理方式还需结合 `subProductType` 和 `txnType` 判断。

description.en: Newly added to let you override Onerway's default 3DS decisioning per transaction.
description.zh: 新增字段，可按单笔交易覆盖 Onerway 默认的 3DS 决策策略。

description.en: Default strategy. Onerway decides whether to trigger 3DS based on the transaction, merchant configuration, and risk controls.
description.zh: 默认策略，由 Onerway 根据交易、商户配置和风控判断是否发起 3DS 验证。
强制走 Onerway 内部 3DS 验证流程。

description.en: Do not use 3DS authentication. Availability depends on merchant configuration and risk requirements.
description.zh: 不走 3DS 验证；是否可用需结合商户配置和风控要求确认。
收银台交易的 3DS 风控策略。

text.en: Checkout does not support `EXTERNAL`.
text.zh: 收银台不支持 `EXTERNAL`。

text.en: Contact Onerway before specifying a non-default strategy.
text.zh: 如需指定非默认策略，需提前联系 Onerway 确认配置。

description.en: Transaction shipping information, including customer delivery address and contact details.
description.zh: 交易收货信息，包括客户收货地址与联系方式。

description.en: Customer first name in Japanese Katakana. Required only for Japan payment methods and Japan-issued cards.
description.zh: 日语片假名格式的名字；仅日本支付方式和日本发行的卡需要。

description.en: Customer last name in Japanese Katakana. Required only for Japan payment methods and Japan-issued cards.
description.zh: 日语片假名格式的姓氏；仅日本支付方式和日本发行的卡需要。

description.en: Customer phone number, local part only (without country code); pass the country code separately in `phoneCountryCode`, which combines with this field into the full number. Onerway does not strictly validate the format.
description.zh: 客户电话号码，仅填本地号码（不含国家码）；国家码请单独传入 `phoneCountryCode`，二者组合为完整号码。Onerway 当前不强校验格式。

condition.en: Required when paying with the MB Way local payment method.
condition.zh: 使用 MB Way 本地支付方式时必填。

description.en: Country dialing code of the customer phone number, digits only without `+`; combines with `phone` to form the full number.
description.zh: 客户电话号码的国家拨号码，纯数字、不含 `+`；与 `phone` 组合为完整号码。

description.en: Customer email address; used for transaction confirmations and dispute handling.
description.zh: 客户邮箱地址，用于交易确认和争议处理。

description.en: Postal or ZIP code. Commonly used by AVS checks.
description.zh: 邮政编码；许多地区的 AVS 验证需要此字段。

description.en: Full address in a single field. It can replace split street, house number, and city fields for general address capture, but should not be used as the only address input when AVS is required.
description.zh: 完整地址字段，可替代街道、门牌号和城市等拆分字段；开启 AVS 时不建议仅用该字段替代拆分地址字段。

condition.en: Required when `country` is `US` or `CA`.
condition.zh: 当 `country` 为 `US` 或 `CA` 时必填。

description.en: Province or state code in [ISO 3166-2](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-2#Current_codes) format.
City name. Recommended when AVS or a complete billing address is required to improve address completeness, authorization rate, and risk checks. Actual validation dimensions vary by issuer and region.
description.zh: 城市名称。开启 AVS 或需要完整账单地址时建议传入，用于补充地址完整性、授权率和风控判断；不同发卡行和地区的实际校验维度可能不同。

description.en: Street name. When AVS is enabled, provide it separately with `number`, `postalCode`, and `city` as billing-address verification data instead of relying only on the full `address` field.
description.zh: 街道名称。开启 AVS 时建议与 `number`、`postalCode`、`city` 拆分传入，作为账单地址验证相关信息；不要仅用完整 `address` 字段替代拆分地址。

description.en: House or building number. When AVS is enabled, provide it separately with `street`, `postalCode`, and `city` as billing-address verification data.
description.zh: 门牌号或建筑号。开启 AVS 时建议与 `street`、`postalCode`、`city` 拆分传入，作为账单地址验证相关信息。

description.en: Government-issued identity identifier, usually required by selected local payment methods. It may be a national ID number or a personal tax number.
description.zh: 政府颁发的身份标识，通常用于特定本地支付方式；可能是身份证号码，也可能是个人税号。

description.en: Request signature string. See [Request signing](/payments/get-started/request-signing) for how to generate it.
description.zh: 请求签名字符串；生成方式详见[请求签名](/zh/payments/get-started/request-signing)。

description.en: Deprecated in favor of `productType`. Still accepted for backward compatibility but will be removed in a future version.
description.zh: 已弃用，请改用 `productType`。为向后兼容仍暂时接受，未来版本将移除。

description.en: Ordinary checkout payment. Execute a one-time debit or authorization according to `txnType`.
description.zh: 普通收银台支付，按 `txnType` 执行一次性扣款或预授权。

description.en: Initial subscription transaction. Used to create a subscription contract through checkout; `subscription` is required, and recurring billing, cancellation, and updates use the corresponding subscription APIs.
description.zh: 初始订阅交易，用于通过收银台创建订阅合约；需同时传入 `subscription`，后续扣款、取消和更新需走对应订阅接口。

description.en: Installment transaction. `txnOrderMsg.periodValue` must use a period value returned by the installment inquiry API.
description.zh: 分期交易；需在 `txnOrderMsg.periodValue` 中传入咨询分期期数���口返回的期数值。

description.en: Transaction processing mode under the selected payment method scope.
description.zh: 所选支付方式范围下的交易处理模式。

text.en: Works with `productType` and `txnType` to define the transaction model.
text.zh: 需要与 `productType` 和 `txnType` 配合定义交易模型。

text.en: Checkout does not support `TOKEN`.
text.zh: 收银台不支持 `TOKEN`。

text.en: For saved-payment-method scenarios, pass `merchantCustId` in non-subscription checkout flows or use `subscription.bindCard` in hosted card subscription flows.
text.zh: 收银台如需让客户保存支付信息，可在非订阅场景传入 `merchantCustId`，或在托管卡订阅场景使用 `subscription.bindCard`。

condition.en: Required when `subProductType=SUBSCRIBE`.
condition.zh: 当 `subProductType=SUBSCRIBE` 时必填。

description.en: Subscription information for creating or initializing a subscription through Checkout. This endpoint is only for the initial subscription request; subsequent billing, cancellation, and updates use the corresponding subscription APIs. Use `selfExecute=1` for Onerway-managed billing, or `selfExecute=2` for merchant-managed recurring billing.
description.zh: 用于通过收银台创建或初始化订阅的信息。本接口仅用于初始订阅；订阅后续扣款、取消、更新需走对应订阅接口。`selfExecute=1` 表示托管订阅；`selfExecute=2` 表示自主管理订阅。

description.en: Subscription request type. Checkout subscription only supports `0` for the initial subscription request. `1` is not supported here and is used for subsequent billing APIs.
description.zh: 订阅请求类型。本接口仅用于初始订阅，仅支持 `0`。`1` 用于后续扣款场景，本接口不支持传入。

description.en: Required subscription customer identifier in the merchant system, used to associate the subscription contract, payment method, and transaction records.
description.zh: 订阅客户在商户系统中的唯一标识，用于关联订阅合约、支付信息和交易记录。

text.en: If top-level `merchantCustId` is also submitted, it must match this value; the top-level field may be omitted.
text.zh: 如果外层 `merchantCustId` 同时传入，必须与本字段保持一致；外层 `merchantCustId` 可不传。

condition.en: Required for Onerway-managed subscriptions (`selfExecute=1`).
condition.zh: Onerway 托管订阅（`selfExecute=1`）时必填。

description.en: Subscription product or plan name. Required for Onerway-managed subscriptions (`selfExecute=1`) and supported for merchant-managed subscriptions (`selfExecute=2`) when you need to identify the product or plan in the subscription record. The same customer cannot purchase the same product again before the existing subscription ends.
description.zh: 订阅产品或计划名称。Onerway 托管订阅（`selfExecute=1`）必填；商户自主管理订阅（`selfExecute=2`）也支持传入，用于在订阅记录中区分商品或计划。同一用户在订阅结束前不能重复购买同一商品。

condition.en: Required for initial subscription purchases through checkout.
condition.zh: 通过收银台发起订阅首次购买时必填。

text.en: `selfExecute=1` supports `D`, `M`, and `Y`; `selfExecute=2` supports `D` only.
text.zh: `selfExecute=1` 支持 `D`、`M`、`Y`；`selfExecute=2` 仅支持 `D`。

condition.en: Required for initial subscription purchases through checkout.
condition.zh: 通过收银台发起订阅首次购买时必填。

description.en: Billing frequency point or interval used together with `frequencyType`.
description.zh: 与 `frequencyType` 配合使用的计费频率点或间隔值。

text.en: For `selfExecute=1`, allowed values are `1`, `7`, or `14` when `frequencyType=D`; `1`, `3`, or `6` when `frequencyType=M`; and only `1` when `frequencyType=Y`.
text.zh: 托管订阅（`selfExecute=1`）中，`frequencyType=D` 时可传 `1`、`7`、`14`；`frequencyType=M` 时可传 `1`、`3`、`6`；`frequencyType=Y` 时仅可传 `1`。

condition.en: Required for Onerway-managed subscriptions (`selfExecute=1`) when the plan end is defined by a fixed number of billing cycles.
condition.zh: 托管订阅中使用固定周期数定义订阅计划时提供。

description.zh: 托管订阅计费周期数量。

text.en: Not supported for `selfExecute=2`.
text.zh: `selfExecute=2` 自主管理订阅不支持。

condition.en: Required when the subscription end is defined by an expiration date.
condition.zh: 使用到期日期定义订阅结束时间时提供。

text.en: Shares the maximum cycle count constraint with `cycleCount`; the subscription derived from `frequencyType` and `frequencyPoint` must not exceed `99` cycles.
text.zh: 与 `cycleCount` 共享最大期数约束；按 `frequencyType` 和 `frequencyPoint` 推导出的订阅周期不得超过 `99` 期。

description.en: Obtain subscription authorization only; the first payment is collected by the merchant later. Available only for self-managed subscriptions (`selfExecute=2`).
description.zh: 仅获取用户订阅授权，首期扣款改由商户自行发起；仅自主管理订阅（`selfExecute=2`）适用。

description.en: Collect the first payment once the customer has authorized; applicable to card subscriptions and local payment methods that require authorization.
description.zh: 获取用户授权后立即完成首期扣款；适用于卡订阅及需用户授权的本地支付方式。

description.en: How the first subscription payment is collected.

text.en: `1` obtains subscription authorization only and lets the merchant collect the first payment later; it is available only for `selfExecute=2`.
text.zh: `1` 仅获取用户订阅授权并返回授权结果，暂不扣款，首期扣款改由商户自行发起；仅自主管理订阅（`selfExecute=2`）适用。

text.en: `2` collects the first payment once the customer has authorized and is the default when omitted.
text.zh: `2` 获取用户授权后立即完成首期扣款；不传时默认为 `2`。

description.en: Automatic billing by Onerway according to the subscription plan.
description.zh: 由 Onerway 按订阅计划自动扣款。

description.en: Merchant-triggered billing for each subscription cycle.
description.zh: 由商户在每个订阅周期主动触发扣款。

description.en: Whether to save the customer card after a successful Onerway-managed card subscription.
description.zh: 托管卡订阅场景下，订阅成功后是否保存客户卡信息。

text.en: The saved payment token is returned as `tokenId` in the asynchronous notification and should be stored for subsequent subscription APIs.
text.zh: 保存的支付信息会通过异步通知中的 `tokenId` 返回，商户需保存并用于后续订阅接口。

text.en: Not supported for `selfExecute=2`.
text.zh: `selfExecute=2` 自主管理订阅不支持。

description.en: Trial period is charged according to the subscription plan.
description.zh: 试用期按订阅计划收费。

description.en: Trial period billing mode for Onerway-managed subscriptions.
description.zh: 托管订阅的试用期计费控制。

text.en: `0` means the trial period is not charged; `1` means it is charged according to the plan.
text.zh: `0` 表示不计费；`1` 表示按订阅计划计费。

text.en: Not supported for `selfExecute=2`.
text.zh: `selfExecute=2` 自主管理订阅不支持。

condition.en: Required for Onerway-managed subscriptions (`selfExecute=1`) when a trial length is configured by days.
condition.zh: Onerway 托管订阅（`selfExecute=1`）且按天数配置试用期时必填。

description.en: Trial period duration in days, counted from the subscription start.
description.zh: 试用期持续天数，用于指定从订阅生效后连续试用多少天。

text.en: Supported for Onerway-managed subscriptions and mutually exclusive with `trialEnd`.
text.zh: 托管订阅支持；与 `trialEnd` 二选一。

text.en: Not supported for `selfExecute=2`.
text.zh: `selfExecute=2` 自主管理订阅不支持。

condition.en: Required for Onerway-managed subscriptions (`selfExecute=1`) when a trial end date is configured.
condition.zh: Onerway 托管订阅（`selfExecute=1`）且配置试用期结束日期时必填。

description.en: Trial period end date used to specify when the trial period ends.
description.zh: 试用期结束日期，用于直接指定试用期截止到哪一天。

text.en: Supported for Onerway-managed subscriptions and mutually exclusive with `trialDays`.
text.zh: 托管订阅支持；与 `trialDays` 二选一。

text.en: Not supported for `selfExecute=2`.
text.zh: `selfExecute=2` 自主管理订阅不支持。

description.en: Buyer email address used for subscription confirmation, status-change, and billing notifications.
description.zh: 订阅通知邮箱；订阅确认、状态变更、扣款通知都会发送到该邮箱。

text.en: Not supported for `selfExecute=2`.
text.zh: `selfExecute=2` 自主管理订阅不支持。

description.zh: 订阅交易的自定义数据。

text.en: If both top-level `metaData` and `subscription.metaData` are submitted, `subscription.metaData` takes precedence.
text.zh: 若外层 `metaData` 与 `subscription.metaData` 同时传入，以 `subscription.metaData` 为准。

description.en: Transaction business information, including `returnUrl`, `notifyUrl`, `appId`, and product details. Browser, device, and cardholder IP data are collected by the hosted checkout page and are not submitted by the merchant in this request.
description.zh: 交易业务信息，包含 `returnUrl`、`notifyUrl`、`appId` 和商品信息等。浏览器、设备和持卡人 IP 信息由收银台页面侧采集，不在本请求中由商户传入。

description.en: Synchronous return URL used to redirect the customer after payment. Add the merchant order ID or another identifier to the URL and query the transaction result after the customer returns.
description.zh: 客户付款完成后的同步返回地址。建议在 `returnUrl` 后拼接订单号或其他标识，并在客户同步返回时主动查询交易结果。

description.en: List of products purchased by the customer. Product amount, discount, and shipping fee entries must add up to `orderAmount`.
description.zh: 顾客购买的商品信息列表；商品金额、折扣和运费合计需要等于 `orderAmount`。

condition.en: Required for `stc pay`, `Tamara`, `Tabby`, and `MADA`.
condition.zh: `stc pay`、`Tamara`、`Tabby`、`MADA` 必填。

condition.en: Required for `stc pay`, `Tamara`, `Tabby`, and `MADA`; use `virtual` or `physical` for product lines that those methods must categorize.
condition.zh: `stc pay`、`Tamara`、`Tabby`、`MADA` 必填；这些支付方式需要区分商品项时使用 `virtual` 或 `physical`。

description.en: Discount line item. The amount must be negative.
description.zh: 折扣商品项，金额需要传负数。

description.en: Product category. Omit this field for regular products. `virtual` and `physical` distinguish whether fulfillment is required; `shipping_fee` and `discount` can be used for all payment methods.
description.zh: 商品类别；默认不填即普通商品。`virtual` 和 `physical` 用于区分是否涉及发货；`shipping_fee` 和 `discount` 可用于所有支付方式。

description.en: Store ID generated during Onerway onboarding.
description.zh: 店铺 ID，商户在 Onerway 入驻时生成并可在后台获取。

condition.en: Required for `stc pay`, `Tamara`, `Tabby`, and `MADA`.
condition.zh: `stc pay`、`Tamara`、`Tabby`、`MADA` 必填。

description.en: Merchant platform identifier. Use the website domain for web transactions or the app name for app transactions.
description.zh: 商户平台标识。Web 端传网站域名，App 端传应用名称。

condition.en: Required when top-level `subProductType=INSTALLMENT`.
condition.zh: 外层 `subProductType=INSTALLMENT` 时必填。

description.en: Installment payment period returned by the installment consultation API.
description.zh: 分期付款期数，应使用咨询分期期数接口返回的期数值。

description.en: Server-side notification URL for asynchronous payment result callbacks. Merchants are advised to query the transaction result after receiving the webhook notification.
description.zh: 支付结果异步通知地址；商户收到 Webhook 通知后建议主动查询确认交易结果。

description.en: Debit-style transaction. Together with `subProductType=DIRECT`, `SUBSCRIBE`, or `INSTALLMENT`, it is used for ordinary payment, initial subscription, or installment payment.
description.zh: 扣款型交易。与 `subProductType=DIRECT` / `SUBSCRIBE` / `INSTALLMENT` 组合时，分别用于普通支付、初始订阅或分期交易。

description.en: Authorization-style transaction. Funds are authorized first and not captured immediately. It is usually used for card payment scenarios that support authorization; availability depends on the selected `productType`, `subProductType`, and the merchant's enabled configuration.
description.zh: 预授权型交易，先完成授权不立即请款。通常用于支持预授权的卡支付场景，仍需结合 `productType`、`subProductType` 和商户开通配置确认是否可用。

description.en: Transaction operation type. It works together with `productType` and `subProductType` to define the transaction model and is also returned in transaction queries and asynchronous notifications.
description.zh: 要执行的支付操作类型；该字段与 `productType`、`subProductType` 共同定义交易模型，交易查询和异步通知也会返回。

description.en: Response code; `20000` means the request was processed successfully, other values are error codes. See [Response codes](/payments/api-reference/response-codes).
description.zh: 响应码；`20000` 表示请求处理成功，其余为错误码。完整码表见[响应码](/zh/payments/api-reference/response-codes)。

description.en: Human-readable message for the response code.
description.zh: 响应码对应的可读说明。

description.en: Business data object for the checkout session creation response.
description.zh: 收银台会话创建响应的业务数据对象。

description.en: Transaction number generated by Onerway for tracking and querying.
description.zh: Onerway 为本次交易生成的交易号，用于跟踪与查询。

description.en: Payment intent ID identifying this payment; currently one request maps to one `paymentId`, one-to-one with `transactionId`.
description.zh: 支付意图 ID，标识本次支付；当前一笔请求对应一个 `paymentId`，与 `transactionId` 一一对应。

description.en: Merchant payment order number, echoing the `merchantTxnId` from the request.
description.zh: 商户支付订单号，回显请求中的 `merchantTxnId`。

description.en: Merchant number assigned by Onerway, identifying the merchant account.
description.zh: Onerway 分配的商户号，标识商户账户。

description.en: API response time in `yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss` format.
description.zh: 接口响应时间，格式 `yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss`。

when.en: Has a value after the transaction is processed; empty at the checkout session creation stage.
when.zh: 交易处理后才有值；会话创建阶段为空。

description.en: Transaction completion time in `yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss` format.
description.zh: 交易完成时间，格式 `yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss`。

when.en: Has a value after the transaction completes; empty at the checkout session creation stage.
when.zh: 交易完成后才有值；会话创建阶段为空。

description.en: Original order amount in the transaction currency. Returned as a decimal string using the amount precision accepted for the submitted `orderCurrency`.
description.zh: 原始订单金额，以交易币种计价；以十进制字符串返回，精度遵循提交的 `orderCurrency` 可接受的小数规则。

description.en: Order currency, a three-letter [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217) currency code.
description.zh: 下单币种，[ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217) 三位字母货币代码。

description.en: Do not rely on this field for the settled amount. The actual settlement amount is settled per settlement batch; refer to the batch settlement details or report.
description.zh: 请勿依赖本字段判断到账金额。实际结算金额按结算批次结算，以对应批次的结算明细 / 结算报表为准。

when.en: Deprecated field; no reliable settlement amount is available from the checkout session creation response.
when.zh: 已弃用字段；收银台会话创建响应中不提供可靠到账金额。

description.en: Do not rely on this field for the settlement currency. The settlement currency follows the settlement configuration pre-agreed between the merchant and Onerway.
description.zh: 请勿依赖本字段判断结算币种。结算币种以商户与 Onerway 预先约定的结算配置为准。

when.en: Deprecated field; no reliable settlement currency is available from the checkout session creation response.
when.zh: 已弃用字段；收银台会话创建响应中不提供可靠结算币种。

description.en: Transaction time zone offset in `±HH:mm` format.

when.en: Has a value after the transaction completes; empty at the checkout session creation stage.
when.zh: 交易完成后才有值；会话创建阶段为空。

description.en: Redirect is required to continue payment.
Transaction is under review or approval.
Checkout transaction is unpaid or unfinished.
description.zh: 收银台交易未支付或未完成。

description.en: Current transaction processing status; always `U` (unpaid) right after the checkout session is created.
description.zh: 当前交易处理状态；收银台会话创建后恒为 `U`（未支付）。

description.en: Payment-intent-level status. Currently one request maps to one payment intent and `paymentStatus` stays consistent with the transaction status; cross-attempt intent state transitions are not yet supported. `U` right after session creation.
description.zh: 支付意图级状态。当前一笔请求对应一个支付意图，`paymentStatus` 与交易状态保持一致，暂不支持跨多次尝试的意图状态流转；会话创建后为 `U`。

description.en: Description of the failure reason for merchant troubleshooting and customer messaging.
description.zh: 交易失败原因说明，供商户排查与向客户提示。

when.en: Has a value when the transaction is declined or fails; empty when the checkout session is created successfully.
when.zh: 交易被拒绝 / 失败时才有值；会话创建成功时为空。

description.en: Checkout page URL; the merchant should redirect the customer here to complete the payment.
description.zh: 收银台页面地址；商户应将客户跳转至该地址完成支付流程。

description.en: Response signature string; verifying the response signature is currently not recommended for merchants.
description.zh: 响应签名字符串；当前不建议商户对响应验签。

description.en: Subscription contract ID identifying the subscription; a key parameter for subsequent charges.
description.zh: 订阅合约号，标识订阅，是完成后续扣款的关键参数。

when.en: Has a value after the initial subscription succeeds via asynchronous notification or query, usually stored together with `tokenId`; empty at checkout session creation.
when.zh: 初始订阅成功后才有值（经异步通知 / 查询），通常与 `tokenId` 成对存储；会话创建时为空。

description.en: Payment token generated from the buyer's payment information. It may be a subscription token for subsequent charges or a card tokenization token for token payments; the two belong to different systems and must not be mixed. Store securely per PCI requirements.
description.zh: 支付 token，基于买家支付信息生成。可能是订阅 token（用于后续扣款）或卡令牌化 token（用于 token 支付）；两者属不同体系、不可混用。需按 PCI 要求妥善保管。

when.en: Has a value after the initial subscription or card tokenization succeeds via asynchronous notification or query; empty at checkout session creation.
when.zh: 初始订阅成功或卡令牌化成��后才有值（经异步通知 / 查询）；会话创建时无值。

description.en: Electronic Commerce Indicator (ECI) marking the transaction security level and liability shift.
description.zh: 电子商务指示符（ECI），标识交易安全等级与责任转移。

when.en: Has a value only for 3DS transactions.
Has a value only for installment transactions.

description.en: Alipay payment method in mainland China.
description.zh: 支付宝中国内地支付方式。

description.en: Banco do Brasil bank payment method.
description.zh: Banco do Brasil 银行支付方式。
电子资金转账支付方式。
SPEI 银行转账支付方式。
OXXO 现金凭证支付方式。
SEPA 直接借记支付方式。
Pay by Bank 银行账户支付方式。
GrabPay Singapore 钱包支付方式。
Rabbit LINE Pay 支付方式。
Krungsri Online 网银支付方式。
Citi Rewards Points 支付方式。
Touch 'n Go eWallet 支付方式。
BNI 虚拟账户支付方式。
Mandiri 虚拟账户支付方式。
Maybank 虚拟账户支付方式。
Permata 虚拟账户支付方式。
BRI 虚拟账户支付方式。
CIMB 虚拟账户支付方式。

description.en: Local payment method type used for this transaction.
description.zh: 本次交易使用的本地支付方式类型。

when.en: Has a value only for local payment method transactions; empty at checkout session creation.
when.zh: 使用本地支付方式的交易才有值；会话创建时为空。

description.en: QR code value carrying the encoded payment information.
description.zh: 二维码值，承载编码的支付信息。

when.en: Has a value only for QR-code-based payment methods; empty at checkout session creation.
when.zh: 使用二维码的支付方式才有值；会话创建时为空。

description.en: Subscription management URL where the buyer can view and manage their subscription.
description.zh: 订阅管理地址，买家可通过该地址查看和管理订阅。

when.en: Has a value only in subscription scenarios.

description.en: Subscriptions list management URL for managing multiple subscriptions. Distinct from `subscriptionManageUrl` (singular), which manages a single subscription.
description.zh: 订阅列表管理地址，供买家集中管理其多个订阅。与 `subscriptionManageUrl`（单数）区分：单数为单个订阅管理页，复数为多订阅列表页。

when.en: Returned when the buyer subscribes to multiple products at the same time.
when.zh: 买家同时订阅多个产品时返回。
